current_form.value: Captains Portugal at Al-Nassr; remains the most-capped player and leading scorer in men's international football (reported 143 goals from 226 caps). Finished as top scorer at the 2025 Nations League, which Portugal won.

fitness.value: Missed Portugal's March 2026 friendlies with a hamstring strain picked up at Al-Nassr, but named in the World Cup squad and expected to start (lead the line in Houston).

wc_role.value: Captains Portugal at a RECORD sixth World Cup, more than any man in tournament history (he shares the previous joint-record of 5 with Lionel Messi, who is also at 2026). At 41, expected to start; the World Cup is the one major trophy he has never won. Reported to need 2 goals to pass Eusébio's Portugal World Cup record of 9. Portugal in Group K with DR Congo, Uzbekistan and Colombia; open vs DR Congo on 17 June in Houston.

records.value: First man to play in six World Cups (record). Most-capped player and all-time leading scorer in men's international football. Won UEFA Euro 2016 and two UEFA Nations League titles; World Cup is the missing major.
